context.role: Default resting state of Echo the cockatiel
context.screen_position: Center of screen at x=64, y=60, standing on perch
context.usage_scenario: Displayed when no other state is active; base state for all transitions

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel silhouette with distinctive crest (3-4px tall spikes), round body (approx 20px diameter), tail feathers extending downward (8-10px)
visual_specification.texture: Flat pixel art with no gradients; hand-drawn organic edges
visual_specification.outline: None; pure pixel art with color blocking

animation.description: Frame 1: eyes open, Frame 2: eyes open with slight body shift, Frame 3: eyes closed (blink), Frame 4: eyes open returning to Frame 1

visual_specification.details: Eyes are 2x2px each; crest can be in 'normal' position (slightly raised); cheek patch is circular 4x4px area; beak is 3x2px triangle

relationships.shared_with: All Echo states share same color palette and base body structure
relationships.differences_from: echo_eating (no head bobbing), echo_sleeping (eyes open), echo_happy (crest not fully raised)

explicit_negations: no wing details visible in idle state
